title: SctManifest
description: Manifest file declaring the widget types provided by a framework-core-ui plugin.

widgets.description: List of widget definitions provided by this plugin.

SctWidgetEntry.title: SctWidgetEntry
SctWidgetEntry.description: A single widget entry in the manifest.

name.description: Unique widget identifier used as the registry key.

description.description: Human-readable description of the widget's purpose.

channelPattern.description: Glob pattern matched against EventBus channel names to determine whether this widget can handle a given event stream.

consumes.description: List of MIME types that this widget expects to receive. Used for capability-based layout resolution.

priority.description: Priority used to break ties when multiple widgets match the same channel. Higher values win.

defaultRegion.description: Optional preferred region where this widget should be placed by default.

parameters.description: JSON Schema-compatible map of configurable parameter names to their schema descriptors.

additionalProperties.description: JSON Schema descriptor for a single parameter.

module.description: Relative import path resolved from the manifest file's location. Always starts with './'.

export.description: Named export in the module that holds the React component.
